description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 2, 2024 at 7:58 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on West Olympic Boulevard at South Sherbourne Drive. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling westbound on West Olympic Boulevard and slowing to a stop for a queue of traffic. A passenger car 
approached the Waymo AV from behind, and the front of the passenger car made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver was present (in the driver’s seating position). 
Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
